text:
WARRANTY DEED PLAS os 287
STATE OF MISSISSIPPI)
COUNTY OF MARION ;

FOR AND IN CONSIDERATION of the sum of Ten and No/100 Dollars ($10.00),
cash in hand paid, and other good and valuable considerations, the receipt of all of which is hereby
acknowledged, we, the undersigned, GLEN GARNER and BETTY CAROLYN G. McPHAIL,
hereinafter referred to as Grantors, do hereby sell, convey, and warrant unto GARNER TREE
FARM, LLC, a Mississippi limited liability company, hereinafter referred to as Grantee, the following,
described property situated in MARION COUNTY, MISSISSIPPI, to wit:

PARCEL 1:
NE1/4 of SE1/4 of Section 4, Township 5 North, Range 18 West, Marion
County, Mississippi.

PARCEL 2:

SE1/4 of NE1/4 of Section 4, Township 5 North, Range 18 West, Marion
County, Mississippi; LESS AND EXCEPT that certain two-acre tract
described as follows: Commencing at the Northwest comer of the SE1/4 of
NE1/4 of Section 4, Township 5 North, Range 18 West, Marion County,
Mississippi, and thence run a distance of 460 feet and to the East right of way
line of the Columbia to Mt. Carmel Public Road (also being the point of
intersection of the East right of way line of the Mt. Carmel Public Road with
the South right of way line of the Sinclair Public Road); thence run in a
Southerly direction along the East right of way line of the Columbia to Mt.
Carmel Public Road a distance of 420 feet; thence run East a distance of 210
feet; thence run Northerly parallel with the East margin of the Columbia to
Mt. Carmel Public Road to a point due East of the point of beginning; thence
tun West a distance of 210 feet back to the point of beginning; being two (2)
acres, more or less, situated in the SE1/4 of NE1/4 of Section 4, Township 5
North, Range 18 West, Marion County, Mississippi.

PARCEL 3:

13.98 acres in the NE1/4 of NE1/4 of Section 4, Township 5 North, Range
18 West, Marion County, Mississippi, described by beginning at the
Northwest comer of NE1/4 of NE1/4 of said Section 4, and thence run East
8 chains and 50 links to the Columbia & Mt. Carmel Public Road; thence run
South 15 degrees West along the meanderings of the West margin of said
toad 5 chains and 22 links; thence run South along the meanderings of said
West margin of said road 15 chains and 14 links; thence run West 6 chains and
68 links; thence run North 20 chains back to said place of beginning.

TOGETHER WITH all improvements thereon situated and appurtenances thereunto
belonging.
The aforesaid property is conveyed by the Grantors herein and accepted by the

Grantee herein subject to the following, to wit:
